name: Pumpkin Banana Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, baking powder, cinnamon, baking soda, ginger, and salt in a medium bowl.
2. In a large bowl, beat the eggs, pumpkin, granulated sugar, brown sugar, bananas, and oil; mix well.
3. Beat the flour mixture into the pumpkin mixture; stir in the nuts.
4. Spoon the batter into 2 greased and floured 9x5 inch loaf pans.
5. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 55 to 60 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool for 10 minutes. Remove from the pans to wire racks to cool completely.
7. Makes 2 loaves.
